small.description: Compact size for phone cases, earbuds, water bottles, and other small accessories.

medium.description: Everyday size for laptops, notebooks, journals, and personal gear.

large.description: Statement size for packaging, product boxes, folders, and branded merchandise.

extraLarge.description: High-visibility size for car windows, coolers, storage bins, and larger surfaces.

effortlessApplication.title: Effortless Application
effortlessApplication.description: Apply your design with ease. Resulting in a crisp, professional finish that sits seamlessly on any surface.

designedForPrecision.title: Apply with Confidence
designedForPrecision.description: Each design is carefully cut from your uploaded artwork, transferring flawlessly for a crisp and polished final result.

benefitShipsTomorrowByProduct.square-sticker: - Ships fast once you approve your design.
